Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT up.upgrade, count(*) AS change 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS up JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.applicability = true AND up.upgrade != 0 AND (bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.propane.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.propane.total.energy_consumption" >= 0.001) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/380a9284755a6b88f901bf4c3afe6de8c54d69a04b7bf3d1aecfc6168535ffb6/6cbf18e9-6493-4ee8-b2e8-9c08f5424752/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
